# AVAudioEngineManualRenderingMode.offline

**Case**

An engine that operates in an offline mode.

## Declaration

```swift
case offline
```

## Constants

- **AVAudioEngineManualRenderingMode.realtime**: An engine that operates under real-time constraints and doesn’t make blocking calls while rendering.
